title: SCP-151 | The Painting
description: A painting of the sea capable of drowning anyone who looks at it.
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_1d6aaace-8c83-472c-958d-ed37590d3d80.png) *** **The Painting** mod adds six new items _(SCP, documentation, label and more)_ and one structure to the game. The mod is heavily inspired by **SCP-151** from the **SCP Foundation Universe**. **SCP-151** a painting of the sea **capable** of **drowning anyone who looks at it.**

In this mod, any creature that looks at SCP-151 will drown within 24 hours.

 

 
**●** Mod __made by :__ TheCaptainFoxy (me) ● __Mod created with__ MCreator **●** Mod inspired by zcoper's mods         __FAQ__ 
Spoiler

 ► Where can I find the mod content?

SCP-151, its documentation, and its label can only be found inside the SCP-151 containment chamber structure.

The "cloth" can be crafted, you will find the crafting by scrolling down the page.

 

► Where does the structure spawn?

The structure spawns in any Overworld biome at surface level, with approximately one structure every 3000 blocks. 

 

You can find it using /locate command

 

► How can I place the document?

Right-click to read the document.  
Shift + right-click to place it.

 

► How long will it take for SCP-151 to take effect?

If the vision of SCP-151 lasts more than 30 ticks (a second and a half) SCP-151's effect will occur.

 

  *** ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_89967bac-fc27-4546-b641-6b4e9f5d6f4a.png) *** ![SCP-151](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9549d619fef4a2fd4a48d6e57e32978a544312a2_0.webp)

SCP-151 | The Painting

*** **SCP-151** is _"The Painting"_, a painting of the sea **capable** of **drowning anyone who looks at it.** **Looking at SCP-151** for __more than a second and a half__ will result in **your death**. Your oxygen will then slowly begin to deplete, and after __24 hours of Minecraft__, you will **drown**.  

_The total time before drowning is customizable via the_

`_"/gamerule scp151TimerLength [tick]"_`

_Simply enter the time in ticks. The default value is **24000**._

_If you want the timer to be visible, enable :_

_`"/gamerule scp151VisibleTimer true"`_

  Looking at **SCP-151** while holding it will have the __same effect.__ However, __during the one and a half seconds before the effect activates__, you can **rotate it** so that you are no longer looking at the painting’s front. _**Shift+Right Click** will rotate the painting while holding it._ _To place **SCP-151**, it must be rotated properly in order to hang it._ There is a way to __contain the effects__ of **SCP-151** __while **it is placed**__: cover it with a **cloth**. Simply **right-click** on the placed **SCP-151** while holding a **cloth**.   _**The Painting** is compatible with **every** mod._ ***   __Show all content__  
Spoiler

 

 

 

SCP-151 Turned

As mentioned before, SCP-151 can be rotated while holding it by pressing Shift + Right-click.

By doing this, the front of the painting will no longer be visible, and therefore its effect will not activate.

However, in order to hang it on a wall again, it must be rotated back to its upright position.

 

SCP-151 Covered

As mentioned before, SCP-151 can be covered by right-clicking on the placed painting while holding a cloth.

When covered, SCP-151 will no longer have any effect, as the painting itself is not visible.

Right-clicking the covered painting will remove the cloth.

 

However, it cannot be moved while in this state. Once the covered block is broken, the cloth will be removed from the painting and they will drop separately.

The most effective way to move it is to pick it up, be quick, and rotate it so you are not looking at the front. **_WITH EVERY COLOR NOW!_**

 

Cloth

The cloth can be crafted by placing two red carpets, one on top of the other, in the two upper-center slots of the crafting table.

The cloth can be placed over the painting to cover it, and it can be removed either by breaking the painting or by right-clicking on the covered painting. **_WITH EVERY COLOR NOW!_**

   

SCP-151 Containment Chamber

SCP-151 can only be found inside the SCP-151 Containment Chamber/Cell.

The structure spawns in any Overworld biome at surface level and is rare. 

  

SCP-151 Document & SCP-151 Label

The SCP-151 documentation can be found inside the SCP-151 Containment Chamber together with The Painting Covered.
The document is readable, while the label provides information about the SCP’s classification and risk level.

    _● SCP Document: _        [SCP-151 Document](https://scp-wiki.wikidot.com/scp-151) ● You have permission to use this mod in your modpacks! _● Check out my other Mods:_ _[My CurseForge Profile](https://www.curseforge.com/members/thecaptainfoxy/projects)_ _[My Modrinth Profile](https://modrinth.com/user/TheCaptainFoxy)_ _● Join my discord for support/question/suggestions/sneak-peaks and more!_ _TCF Discord_
